name: Rep Activity Mix
description: Per-rep activity volume and composition: calls, emails, meetings, sequence steps, social touches. Replaces Monday-morning squinting at Salesforce activity reports with structured rollups + outlier surfacing.
alsoSurfaces: Which reps changed their activity volume materially in the last 4 weeks?
How is each rep splitting time across calls, emails, meetings, sequence steps?
Which reps are heavy on email vs heavy on calls?
Where are activity outliers concentrated by team?
beforeWeRun: Rep roles: AEs, SDRs, or both?
Activity types: full taxonomy or focused subset?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Rep count, total volume, outlier count, low-utilization count.

whatYoullGet.name: Rep table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: total volume, type breakdown, utilization, trend, outlier flags per rep.

whatYoullGet.name: Activity trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Multi-line chart with reps as lines and weekly volume on y-axis.

whatYoullGet.name: Mix distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked horizontal bar per rep showing activity-type composition.

whatYoullGet.name: Outlier callouts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of flagged reps with specific outlier signals.

whatYoullGet.name: Team comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: Grouped bar chart comparing teams' average activity profiles.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your activity-mix dashboard in ~8 min.
